value.found_quote: Datasets, a feature of the OpenAI platform, provide a quick way to get started with evals and test prompts.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes OpenAI's Datasets feature as part of the Evals platform, confirming it is a feature that provides "a quick way to get started with evals." The page also describes structured test datasets, graders for repeatable large-scale benchmarking, and evaluation of agent/model behavior over stored data — all matching the claim. However, the page clearly states the Evals platform (including Datasets) is being deprecated: it becomes read-only on October 31, 2026, and shuts down on November 30, 2026, so lifecycle_status is 'deprecated' (still works during the transition window but being retired).
